description: Maintain the Algolia module installed by StackFoundry.

# Algolia Maintenance Instructions

- Keep module ownership clear.
- Update docs with behavior changes.
- Add verification steps before release.
- Do not introduce provider lock-in outside the module boundary.

name: algolia
description: Algolia search guidance for installed search modules.
---

# Algolia Guidance

- Keep admin keys server-only.
- Use search-only keys on the client.
- Document index names and object id strategy.
- Verify indexing, deletion, and relevance behavior.
